Risk_Description: Users' movie preferences and watch history may be exposed to unauthorized users
Mitigation_Action: Restrict access to user profiles and encrypt personal preference data

Risk_Description: Unauthorized users may access the administrator dashboard
Mitigation_Action: Implement secure authentication and role-based access control for administrators

Risk_Description: Movie posters trailers or metadata may be used without proper permission
Mitigation_Action: Use licensed movie APIs and provide proper attribution where required

Risk_Description: AI recommendations may be biased or repeatedly suggest similar movies
Mitigation_Action: Diversify recommendation algorithms and allow users to provide feedback on recommendations

Risk_Description: Incorrect or outdated movie information may reduce user trust
Mitigation_Action: Synchronize movie data regularly with trusted movie database APIs

Risk_Description: Chat history may reveal personal interests or sensitive viewing preferences
Mitigation_Action: Allow users to delete chat history and store conversations securely

Risk_Description: Search results or recommendations may become unavailable if the external movie API fails
Mitigation_Action: Implement API error handling caching and fallback recommendations
